mapper.update: create table KUAI_INTERFACE_CONF ( ID VARCHAR(50) not null, TABLES VARCHAR(2000), TABLETYPE VARCHAR(10), ALIAS VARCHAR(200) unique, REMARK VARCHAR(100), CLASSIFY VARCHAR(32), `KEYS` VARCHAR(2000), VERIFY VARCHAR(2000), SETVALUE VARCHAR(500), ROLES VARCHAR(100), FIELD VARCHAR(500), WHERES VARCHAR(500), ISCX VARCHAR(10) default 0, ISXG VARCHAR(10) default 0, ISSC VARCHAR(10) default 0, AFTER VARCHAR(2000), FRONT VARCHAR(2000), LISTCONF VARCHAR(2000), FORMCONF VARCHAR(2000), STATE VARCHAR(1) default 0, ADDTIME datetime default now() )
mapper.select: select table_name TABLE_NAME,(case table_type when 'BASE TABLE' then 'TABLE' when 'SYSTEM VIEW' then 'VIEW' end) TABLE_TYPE,table_comment REMARK, create_time createTime from information_schema.tables where table_schema = (select database()) order by create_time desc
select column_name,DATA_TYPE,character_maximum_length data_length from information_schema.COLUMNS where table_schema=(select database()) and table_name = #{tableName} order by ordinal_position
